title: ABenkle 2 Pack Small Baskets, Cotton Rope Woven Basket, Cute Mini Tiny Storage Baskets, Decorative Boho Basket for Nursery Living Room Bedroom Montessori Shelf, Empty Gift Basket - White
features: 7.5" x 7.5" x 3.5", small storage basket, perfect for small things, like remotes, wallets, keys, pens, make-ups,toys
100% cotton rope basket, skin-friendly, safe for baby, kids, pets, baby basket for kids bedrooms, playrooms
Practical small woven baskets, can be used in office, bedroom, living, kitchen and nursery room
Handmade decorative boho basket, can fit any room decor style perfectly
Small empty gift basket for baby shower, Easter, Christmas or birthday
description: ABenkle 2 pack Small woven rope baskets are great for small storage around the house or laundry collection. Small Cute Size These shallow woven basket are perfect for storing your pencils, knickknacks, makeup, wallets, keys, sunglasses, arts and crafts supplies, stationery, gadgets, small hand towels or any small items. Make your table & desktop clean and tidy. Detailed Sewing Handcrafted from premium cotton rope, sturdy catch-all baskets is ready to organize a wide variety of small household essentials and keep your drawers, shelves, dressers, and closets nice and tidy! Modern Basket Decor Put it on a nightstand, a bedside table, a nursery side table, montessori, walk-in closet, shelves, kitchen countertop, or bathroom vanity top to add a nice touch to your home decor. Adorable Size: 7.5" x 7.5" x 3.5" Desktop & Table Storage Basket - Handcrafted from premium and durable cotton ropes - Lightweight and easy to carry. - Easy to care for - Wipe clean with a damp cloth. -The basket in small size looks very beautiful and cute. Perfect for bedroom, girl's room and kid's room storage. - Made from first-class natural cotton rope material. The basket is soft with no chemical. Safe for home use and even for kids. Perfect for storing your kid's toys, books and diapers. - Cute shape perfect for desk decoration and storage. Storing your Keys, rings, cotton reels, buttons, glass candle, remotes, fruit, candies, Spa, makeup brushes, pencils, toiletries, hair supplies and so on. Convenient for you to place and store your things at any places. - A lovely yet practical gift for friends and family for birthdays, weddings, housewarmings, infant baptism, and any other gift-giving occasion! Package: 2 x Small round baskets
